# Investor Pitch Outline (10 slides) — STRATOSYNC v2.6
Position: Political-Execution Synchronization OS (BCD)

1) Title
- STRATOSYNC — Synchronize Political State, Capital Readiness, Execution Timing

2) Problem
- Execution failures in politically exposed, cross-border projects are caused by “state misalignment”
- Tools exist for politics OR capital OR project management; not for synchronization

3) Solution
- Unified decision layer producing: GO / CONDITIONAL / FREEZE
- Built-in auditability for board/LP/regulators

4) How it works (simple)
- Inputs: P, C, E, noise η
- Outputs: S, Δ, Ψ, State
- Hard freeze safety + conditional lanes

5) Why now
- More cross-border capital with higher geopolitics and policy volatility
- Funds need explainable timing decisions; enterprises need freeze discipline

6) Product
- API + Board dashboard + Evidence bundle
- Integration: data feeds, internal risk, PM systems

7) Use cases (BCD)
- B: mid-market global: “freeze/restart discipline”
- C: politically linked projects: ratification/policy gating
- D: fund managers: timing intelligence + LP transparency

8) Moat
- Synchronization-first design + audit trace + governance controls
- Modular institutional layer; extensible to sovereign compliance

9) Go-to-market
- Beachhead: fund managers + politically exposed project firms
- Land-and-expand via portfolio standardization

10) Traction / Plan / Ask
- Pilot design, deployment milestones, revenue model
- Funding request and use of funds
